description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag for a sports fan than this one. Neatly designed with lots of organiser space, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to school or college. Height: 45 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 16 cmCapacity: 25 litresMade of polyester with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaningBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bagOne main copiously spaced zippered compartment with pouches and a zippered mesh compartmentOne front utility compartment with swoosh logo on itApplique on the frontSynthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
